text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ardan, Ardan... Are you sure about choosing that for your birthday present?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Quite. The mega birthday parfait can only be
ordered on an Umamusume's birthday... Which is
to say, we can only experience it today. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Mgh... I don't know if the two of us can finish such
a ginormous parfait, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"Those who fear the starting gate will never reach
the goal!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It means everything's worth attempting once!
Even if we fail, we're bound to have a good time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I understand now... Those are words of wisdom,
indeed. Rather than reflecting on the past or
lamenting over the future, we should live in the
here and now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Haha, it's really nothing that serious. But I'm happy you liked it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, why don't we go eat? Mega birthday
parfait, here we come!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, let us go. As they say, "Those who fear the
starting gate will never reach the goal." ♪
